code:
%%{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#333,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为LabAnalyzer系统画一个用户生命周期状态图。核心流程是：用户先被邀请，然后注册进入待激活状态，激活后变成活跃状态。活跃之后可以暂停、主动停用，最终都能归档到DiagnosticEngine那边。
明白了。我注意到有两个系统入口：LabAnalyzer触发邀请，DiagnosticEngine也能直接让用户进入待激活状态？还是说DiagnosticEngine只负责最后的归档？
对，两个系统都能产生PendingActivation。LabAnalyzer走邀请-注册链路，DiagnosticEngine那边可能是直接批量导入的用户。但归档统一走DiagnosticEngine。
好，我先把主线画出来：Invited通过UserRegisteredEvent到PendingActivation，PendingActivation通过UserActivatedEvent到Active。然后Active可以暂停、停用，Suspended和Deactivated都能回到Active，最终三类状态都能归档。
状态多了容易看花，给每个状态加个颜色区分吧。Invited用灰色，PendingActivation用橙色提醒待处理，Active绿色，Suspended用深橙色警示，Deactivated也用灰色，Archived用深蓝灰表示终结。
颜色已应用。另外我在每个状态右侧加了注释说明：Invited是"已邀请未注册"，PendingActivation是"已注册未激活"，Active是"账户活跃可访问全部功能"，Suspended是"管理员临时暂停"，Deactivated是"用户主动停用"，Archived标注了归属DiagnosticEngine。
Suspended的注释里加上"by an administrator"吧，强调是管理员操作的。还有，Archived的注释把HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine用括号标清楚来源。
已调整。Suspended注释改为"User account has been temporarily suspended by an administrator"，Archived注释改为"User account has been archived (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)"。
可以了，状态流转和视觉区分都很清楚。LabAnalyzer和DiagnosticEngine的双入口也体现出来了，归档逻辑也统一了。
